# errSecOCSPNotTrustedToAnchor

**Global Variable**

The online certificate status protocol (OCSP) response is not trusted to a root or anchor certificate.

## Declaration

```swift
var errSecOCSPNotTrustedToAnchor: OSStatus { get }
```
